scripts.check: pnpm run check:core && pnpm run check:ui && pnpm --filter openshop-demo run lint
scripts.coverage:unit: node scripts/run-c8.mjs --cwd packages/openshop --clean --temp-directory coverage/tmp --reporter=none -- node tests/bootstrap.ts
scripts.coverage:integration: node scripts/run-c8.mjs --cwd packages/openshop --clean=false --temp-directory coverage/tmp --reporter=none -- node tests/bootstrap-integration.ts
scripts.coverage:demo: DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://openshop:openshop@localhost:5432/openshop} pnpm --dir apps/demo exec drizzle-kit push --config=drizzle.config.ts --force && DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://openshop:openshop@localhost:5432/openshop} node scripts/run-c8.mjs --cwd apps/demo --clean=false --temp-directory coverage/tmp --reporter=none -- node tests/bootstrap.ts
scripts.coverage: rm -rf coverage && pnpm run coverage:unit && pnpm run coverage:integration && pnpm run coverage:demo && pnpm run coverage:report
